sentences.arabic: الْحُصُولُ عَلَى نَوْمٍ كَافٍ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno sna je neophodno za mentalno zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Getting enough sleep is necessary for mental health.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الشَّخْصِ أَنْ يَنَامَ سَبْعَ سَاعَاتٍ عَلَى الْأَقَلِّ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Osoba treba spavati najmanje sedam sati svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: A person should sleep at least seven hours every night.

sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْعَمِيقُ يُسَاعِدُ الدِّمَاغَ عَلَى التَّرْكِيزِ بَشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Dubok san pomaže mozgu da se bolje fokusira.
sentences.translationEn: Deep sleep helps the brain focus better.
